mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projects (resume_id, project_name, role, project_url, start_date, end_date, description, technologies_used, achievements, sort_order) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{projectName}, #{role}, #{projectUrl}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{description}, #{technologiesUsed}, #{achievements}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM projects WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM projects WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
SELECT id FROM projects WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId}
